quoteDescription: P01938 75ml Parfum 40x33mm Australian Nutraceuticals 2 Kinds (Laminate Dir #3)
lineDescription: || P01938 75ml Parfum 40x33mm Australian Nutraceuticals 2 Kinds (Laminate Dir #3)||Size: 40mm x 33mm||Material: PP Metallic Silver||Print Colour: White + CMYK||Tool: D0415(4,6)(3,2)1.5mm Rectangle||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: GLOSS LAMINATE||MACHINE APPLIED||Qty: 4400||||2,200 x [171801] LABEL SIGNATURE PARFUM 75ML P02 PINK CARAMUSK||2,200 x [171816] LABEL TRIBUTE PARFUM 75ML - D11 DARK CHERRYWOOD||***Manual Discount For Recent Order***||
